Using selectFrom(AUTHOR) fetches all columns from the AUTHOR table, which may retrieve unnecessary data. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed for the AuthorPojo.
Using selectFrom(AUTHOR) fetches all columns from the AUTHOR table for every row. Consider explicitly selecting only the required columns using select() to improve query performance.
Using fetchOne(AUTHOR, ...) fetches all columns from the AUTHOR table into the record. Consider using selectFrom with explicit column selection if not all columns are needed for the update operation.
